title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Simplilearn - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Simplilearn, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
